download_note: arXiv PDF available; project page reports code/data availability.

title: Seeing With Sound: Long-range Acoustic Beamforming for Multimodal Scene Understanding
authors: Praneeth Chakravarthula et al.
venue: IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR)
summary_cn: 用远距离声学 beamforming 辅助多模态场景理解，展示声学信号在低光和遮挡/NLOS 情况下对视觉的互补性。
why_include_cn: 不是成像重建核心，但属于 CVPR 中“声 + 视觉融合感知”的高相关论文。
download_note: CVF open-access PDF available.

title: High-speed acoustic holography with arbitrary scattering objects
authors: Ryuji Hirayama; Giorgos Christopoulos; Diego Martinez Plasencia; Sriram Subramanian
summary_cn: 考虑任意散射物体存在时的高速声学全息计算，使声场/悬浮显示在复杂边界下仍可工作。
why_include_cn: Science Advances 声学全息代表作，和声学编码/声场控制强相关。
download_note: Science Advances article is open access; PDF URL should download where available.

title: Silicon-photonics acoustic detector for optoacoustic micro-tomography
authors: Yoav Hazan; Ahiad Levi; Michael Nagli; Amir Rosenthal
summary_cn: 提出小型硅光声学探测器并用于活体 optoacoustic micro-tomography。
why_include_cn: Nature Communications 中集成声学探测与光声层析结合的代表。
download_note: Nature Communications open-access PDF URL included.

title: Learning the Geometry of Wave-Based Imaging
authors: K. Kothari et al.
summary_cn: NeurIPS 中面向波动成像几何的学习方法，应用包括 photoacoustic tomography 与 reflection seismology。
why_include_cn: 不是最新，但覆盖 NeurIPS 与波动/光声成像交叉。
download_note: NeurIPS proceedings PDF available.

title: GS-PAT: High-Speed Multi-Point Sound-Fields for Phased Arrays of Transducers
authors: Diego Martinez Plasencia; Ryuji Hirayama; Roberto Montano-Murillo; Sriram Subramanian
summary_cn: 用于相控阵换能器多点声场快速相位检索的 GPU 算法，是后续声学全息/空中触觉/声场编码的重要基础。
why_include_cn: ACM TOG/SIGGRAPH 经典声学编码算法。
download_note: UCL accepted manuscript PDF available.

title: Deep tissue space-gated microscopy via acousto-optic interaction
authors: M. Jang et al.
summary_cn: 通过高频超声焦点调制与 space gating 抑制多重散射，从而提升深组织光学显微成像。
why_include_cn: 典型声光相互作用辅助光学显微。
download_note: Nature Communications open-access PDF URL included.

title: Acousto optic imaging beyond the acoustic diffraction limit using speckle decorrelation
authors: Daniel Doktofsky; Moriya Rosenfeld; Ori Katz
summary_cn: 利用 speckle decorrelation 实现超过声学衍射极限的声光成像。
why_include_cn: 声光成像（AOI）物理机制与超分辨方向的重要 Nature Portfolio 论文。
download_note: Communications Physics open-access PDF URL included.

title: A volumetric display for visual, tactile and audio presentation using acoustic trapping
authors: Ryuji Hirayama; Diego Martinez Plasencia; Nobuyuki Masuda; Sriram Subramanian
summary_cn: 通过声学俘获实现视觉、触觉和声音一体的体显示，是声场控制和声光/多感官展示的 Nature 代表作。
why_include_cn: 不是传统成像重建，但对声学编码显示和声场控制很重要。
download_note: Nature page and Sussex Figshare record available; no direct PDF link recorded here.

title: Acoustic Non-Line-Of-Sight Imaging
authors: David B. Lindell; Gordon Wetzstein; Vladlen Koltun
venue: IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR)
summary_cn: CVPR 2019 声学非视域成像奠基论文，用低成本声学硬件捕获隐藏三维几何。
why_include_cn: 虽然不是最新，但几乎是声学 NLOS 必收基础文献。
download_note: CVF open-access PDF available.
